title: Optimize 3 performance bottlenecks in a sorting/filtering module

result.details:
=== Part 1: Functional Correctness Tests (6 points) ===
=== Correctness Tests ===
PASS generate_data
PASS sort_ascending
PASS sort_descending
PASS sort_stability
PASS filter_records
PASS format_output

=== RESULTS: 6 passed, 0 failed ===

Functional tests: 6 / 6

=== Part 2: Structural / Pattern Checks (3 points) ===
PASS struct_no_json_copy: No json serialization for copying
PASS struct_uses_join: format_output uses join
PASS struct_no_bubble_sort: No bubble sort pattern in sort_records

=== Part 3: Performance / Timing Check (1 point) ===
PASS timing_sort_10k: 10000 records sorted in 0.004s (limit 0.5s)

=== Summary ===
Functional: 6 / 6
Structural: 4 / 3
Structural: 3 / 3
Timing: 1 / 1
Score: 10/10
